French High A2 Mega Deck

A single-file offline HTML flashcard site focused on high A2 French: advanced everyday vocabulary, functional grammar, tense work, 42 common verbs, and large-scale translation practice. This deck contains 3,930 cards.

520 vocabulary cards
134 grammar cards
1,260 conjugation cards
2,016 sentence translation cards

Tap the card or press Space to flip. Move with ← and →. Press F to favorite and K to mark known.
Search works across the prompt, answer, subcategory, and tags, so you can study by tense, theme, or specific grammar targets like y, en, imparfait, or travel.

Progress, favorites, and known cards are stored locally in your browser using localStorage.
